title: AVITHRAPID - Standard Operating Procedure - Cytotoxicity Cell Viability assay
author: Varasi, Ilenia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) defines the method for evaluating the cytotoxicity of test compounds within the AVITHRAPID project using a luminescence-based cell viability assay.
steps_raw: This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) defines the method for evaluating the cytotoxicity of test compounds within the AVITHRAPID project using a luminescence-based cell viability assay.
